zh.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend是Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq的女兒，出生。她和John de Warenne至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend是Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq的女儿，出生。她和John de Warenne至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tounsend
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Townsend
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived at the extremity of a village, from Middle English toun(es)ende. Compare Town . There may have been some confusion with Townson .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend was born as the daughter of Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq. She had at least 1 son with John de Warenne.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend est née, fille de Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec John de Warenne.

de.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend wurde, als Tochter von Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq geboren. Sie hatte mit John de Warenne mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend è nata il come figlia di Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con John de Warenne.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de TounsendはRoger DE TOUNSEND Esqの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn de Warenneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend(은)는 Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John de Warenne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend nasceu filha de Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com John de Warenne.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend родилась. Её отца звали Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John de Warenne.

es.lifeSummary: Alice de Tounsend nació como hija de Roger DE TOUNSEND Esq. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con John de Warenne.
